chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3254 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.22115/2023 2. For hearing on Misc. No.15401/2023 3. For hearing of main case 24.01.2025 Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Ashraf Ali Butt and Rehmat-un-Nisa, advocates for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel points out that the issue is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Bilquees Khalid and another vs. Federation of Pakistan and another reported as 2022 CLC 2002, and may be disposed off in mutatis mutandis application of the ratio so determined. Learned counsel for respondent is present and articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. In view hereof this petition is disposed off in mutatis mutandis application of ratio of the judgment cited supra. Judge Judge Amjad
